extraction.one_line_summary: BATTAGLIN Enrico won Stage 5 sprint from reduced group after peloton caught break at 3.5km, ARU maintaining maglia rosa
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step drove tempo with KIRY anchoring, collapsing 5+ minute break in final 5km demonstrating late-stage pursuit dominance.
UAE Emirates isolated ULISSI for attack with 1km remaining, but effort failed when ARU immediately marked the move.
Multiple domestiques sequentially dropped back to pace VIVIANI after split, revealing Quick-Step's delayed reaction protocol for leader rescues.
Sky positioned FROOME aggressively inside final 3km on home roads despite no summit finish, signaling GC nervousness even on transitional stages.

rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: caught behind peloton split requiring multiple teammate rescues, suggesting positioning vulnerability on technical run-ins
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: immediately marked ULISSI attack at 1km with sprint to bonus seconds, showing aggressive race-leading rather than defensive riding
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: neutral: UAE committed to attack with 1km but ARU's marking negated advantage, revealing team willing to gamble on uphill kicks
rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: lost teammates inside final 3km suggesting Lotto-NL struggling with technical positioning despite previous day's success
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: finished top-5 again in uphill finish, confirming consistent positioning on varied terrain types
